LoginForm.subtext: Please enter your credentials to access your CRM.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.subtitle: Manage your account preferences, branding, and workspace configurations.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your personal profile details and how you appear in SimpleCRM.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of your interface.
appearance.languageDescription: Choose the language used across the application.

password.title: Password
password.description: Change your password to ensure your account security.
password.managedByAdmin: Password updates are managed by your administrator.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Irreversible actions that affect the entire workspace.
dangerZone.resetDescription: This will delete all leads, team members, activity history, and public capture forms. This action is final.
